textByHash.08371d720f3003fcc53131333b89be40fb7864cf: He says hello, and this is Kikazaru
textByHash.5d55126f0fddafdf8807971766103a8f5369ca61: Grrr. Do you have any other questions?
textByHash.a88273ce8ac82aec8afde42cd22f834e64416b45: You look trustworthy, I'll tell you a secret.
textByHash.15cc2609e50754b95fb869b169e5ef58a54f7bb3: (whispers) We're on a top secret mission, given to us by the King...
textByHash.6ab169eb0628c097cca32cc02a4651abea52212a: We are the exalted Guardians of one of the King's biggest secrets.
textByHash.b71b2d75580b2020160d66338e12bf696d4a1011: Can't say any more than that or the King would go Ape on us.
textByHash.8aaa2f31bfb39788b7a690bbd422aef5d5ea263a: No. We will protect the recipe with our lives...
textByHash.f6739682eba30d6e4b3a059cd43a1648f037576e: NO!, I forbid you to tell this stranger anything!
textByHash.6dd8576097fd8cb10feb1fe9e022078c70fce07d: Yeah, well hear this gnome-brain! (He slaps Kikazaru)
textByHash.e4ea92b4f0e3960698e5fed80b14d83425e984e7: How do you know about that - It's top secret information you know.
textByHash.ca4ef44ff6b5dc0b09cbf96da66d9e71a1054a3a: Ah I see, can you tell me what the mission is?
textByHash.2c6182ae48b9b2592068c280cdd7712666070a64: Well, in that case, you definitely do need to know the recipe.
textByHash.38afe1fb6186c0bb8988de6b4e013ec6037ef40b: The King has a real soft spot for Roasted Giant Snake stuffed with sliced banana and monkey nut paste.
textByHash.52609cd8d777c0578381e0b62079755ee3f58885: Yup, you need to find some bananas, and some monkey nuts and stuff a Giant snake with them, It's as simple as that. Stop hassling me Iwazaru.
textByHash.046f48c8ee2217c0153284e9591233cb9076b13f: Every monkey knows where to get hold of nuts and bananas, but I believe that the snakes live on a nearby island. Never seen one myself.
textByHash.b6e2ba6ac74c8b6e97712284d9325f838ccfadf8: Some monkey nuts, a banana and a snake to stuff them into.
textByHash.87ff1f47bf03af30c3ef7cd40dd6405d858ec39c: I've heard that there are snakes on a small island just to the east of here. Nuts and bananas? Just check out the normal places.
textByHash.1ce604515f42fa4a84d420256312669bab1c9b69: Stop making such a fuss Iwazaru.
textByHash.59298eb7ad15298d225ba31f635f0c31eb6fdf95: No, no, no. Always looking to be the centre of attention that one. Don't let him worry you.
textByHash.0c5cd166e76346513ce7221f3c73875a78c1be9a: Ook. Ah Ah! Ah Uh Ah! Ook. Ook.
textByHash.28ea83b097c64dc02d8dc9d03387b4f2a02d21f9: Ah Ah! Ook. Ook Ah Ook! Ook Ah Uh!
textByHash.383489c2bce25fa4aece1bf74096d616a6510bf8: This feels like the banana, this should do the job.
textByHash.39e588a479c56b664c6e1a73e389f40b8cff8252: Iwazaru says that there is a tree in the West of the Island.
textByHash.c82ed93fae1b0c78df117e7aac55b4795923b132: Iwazaru says that there is a bush in a cave somewhere in the hills just south of the village.
textByHash.d16d5a13daa0b22a23559cd4fe9fcbaf87ab0781: Mmm these are very tasty. Tchiki Monkey nuts really are the best nuts I've ever tasted.
textByHash.ab31c027aec343742758f77f8e4427a30be3a24f: Oh yes, I'd recognise the taste of red anywhere.
textByHash.b3cfd6f53065306e14e423d76fb6a7eef13898ba: Have you cooked the snake yet?
textByHash.63327986e31df4b4b2bae0e5534c62990c587437: That was a bit careless wasn't it? You'd better go and make another one then.
textByHash.a03df7b7c8e133d8726624ee8f9b7e70d2cb187b: Get a red banana, some tchiki monkey nuts, and the snake corpse. Prepare the ingredients and stuff them into the snake. Simple. Even Kikazaru could do it.
textByHash.bf35faec8b88704fc98c9d54ac0eafb3d59f88e5: A very good question. Anyone know?
textByHash.af1827772709298f9caed03aaeb4f721473917f1: You'd better cook it now then.
textByHash.76c1fdcd74bd1fdc18e57388bc7c2663d06db971: You still here? You haven't lost the royal dish have you?
textByHash.c117dd20e7319b7dab33c503d5afbe111b3cbbd5: You'd better make another one then... You know what to do.
textByHash.5271fdd315301383c8a9d8b531a9acce18a73207: Maybe the King wouldn't notice if we had a little bit?
textByHash.3abbdd6c4fa8a176e5e81f9971c689119c3633c7: Take that thing away from us. It will only fill us with unfulfilled longing...
textByHash.525a1a425b3d701d7766e39831de080ace9c0f91: Ook Ah Uh! Ook Ah Uh! Ah Ah!
textByHash.b9c47d2e1908dc00fdceaf737aa569a0674b0352: Ook! Ah Uh Ah! Ook. Ook Ook! Ook.
textByHash.f92f162ee5d766d31804196a61841e0716f7caab: Ook Ah Ook! Ah Uh Ah! Ook Ah Ook!
textByHash.8d6bb6203369eb875f409507b192d03da4b789ac: Ah Uh Ah! Ook Ah Ook! Ook. Ook.
textByHash.e9c7734d2df7e954a64953fe33c2a4bdb64ac5b5: Born from an egg on a mountain top,
textByHash.5101a0104796cf9e74d5ea576d463aef225e797b: The punkiest Monkey that ever popped,
textByHash.29d71d9b3ff7094d2089a37bb1e383b19221a478: All monkey stories are fun. Maybe I'll tell it to you some time...
